prompt: {"type":"editorial portrait collage","subject":{"gender_presentation":"young woman","hair":{"color":"dark brown","style":"short straight bob, chin-length, side-parted"},"wardrobe":{"main_garment":"light-colored traditional kimono with large geometric gray blocks and subtle fine-line texture","obi":"dark plum or deep brown obi tied in a bow at the back"},"pose_and_mood":"calm, reflective, elegant, soft candid presence"},"scene":{"location":"outdoor cherry blossom grove in full bloom","season":"spring","lighting":"strong golden-hour backlight with dreamy haze, glowing highlights, soft overexposure, sun flare","color_palette":"pale pink, cream, blush, warm white, soft gray, muted plum","depth_of_field":"very shallow depth of field with heavy foreground and background bokeh from blossoms"},"layout":{"grid":{"rows":2,"columns":3,"count":6},"images":[{"position":"top-left","description":"close side-profile portrait facing left, upper body framed tightly, blossoms filling foreground and background"},{"position":"top-center","description":"close side-profile portrait facing right, one hand raised lightly near the lips, soft backlight through blossoms"},{"position":"top-right","description":"three-quarter full-body side view standing beneath cherry trees, kimono and obi clearly visible, sunlight streaming from upper right"},{"position":"bottom-left","description":"close portrait partially obscured by out-of-focus cherry blossoms in the foreground, subject turned left"},{"position":"bottom-center","description":"mid-length back three-quarter pose with head turned slightly left, obi bow centered, dense cherry blossoms behind"},{"position":"bottom-right","description":"back three-quarter portrait looking upward toward bright sunlight, strong lens flare and glowing rim light"}]},"style":{"photography":"romantic Japanese spring portrait photography","finish":"high-key, airy, pastel, cinematic, softly diffused","composition":"intimate candid editorial shots with floral framing in every panel"},"prompt":"Create a 6-image editorial portrait collage of a {argument name=\"subject\" default=\"young woman\"} wearing a {argument name=\"kimono pattern\" default=\"light traditional kimono with large geometric gray blocks\"} and a {argument name=\"obi color\" default=\"dark plum\"} obi, photographed under {argument name=\"blossom type\" default=\"cherry blossoms\"} in full spring bloom. Use {argument name=\"lighting style\" default=\"golden-hour backlight with dreamy haze and lens flare\"}. Hair is a short dark-brown bob. Produce a 2x3 grid with exactly 6 distinct portraits: 1 close side-profile facing left, 1 close side-profile facing right with fingers near lips, 1 three-quarter full-body side view, 1 close portrait obscured by foreground blossoms, 1 mid-length back three-quarter pose showing the obi bow, and 1 back three-quarter portrait gazing toward the sun. Emphasize shallow depth of field, heavy floral bokeh, pastel pink and cream tones, airy high-key exposure, soft cinematic diffusion, romantic Japanese portrait photography."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"编辑人像拼图","subject":{"gender_presentation":"年轻女性","hair":{"color":"深棕色","style":"短直波波头，下巴长度，侧分"},"wardrobe":{"main_garment":"浅色传统和服，带有大面积几何灰色块和细腻纹理","obi":"深李色或深棕色腰带，后背系成蝴蝶结"},"pose_and_mood":"平静、沉思、优雅、柔和的抓拍感"},"scene":{"location":"盛开的户外樱花林","season":"春季","lighting":"强烈的黄金时段逆光，带有梦幻雾气、发光高光、柔和过曝和太阳耀斑","color_palette":"淡粉色、奶油色、腮红粉、暖白色、柔灰色、柔和的李子色","depth_of_field":"极浅景深，前景和背景有浓郁的樱花虚化效果"},"layout":{"grid":{"rows":2,"columns":3,"count":6},"images":[{"position":"左上","description":"紧凑的侧面特写，面朝左侧，上半身构图，前景和背景充满樱花"},{"position":"中上","description":"侧面特写，面朝右侧，一只手轻触唇边，樱花间透出柔和逆光"},{"position":"右上","description":"四分之三全身侧面视角，站在樱花树下，和服与腰带清晰可见，阳光从右上角射入"},{"position":"左下","description":"近景人像，部分被前景失焦的樱花遮挡，主体转向左侧"},{"position":"中下","description":"中景背部四分之三姿势，头部微向左转，腰带蝴蝶结居中，背景为茂密樱花"},{"position":"右下","description":"背部四分之三视角人像，仰望明亮阳光，强烈的镜头耀斑和发光的轮廓光"}]},"style":{"photography":"浪漫日系春日人像摄影","finish":"高调、轻盈、粉彩色、电影感、柔和漫射","composition":"亲密的抓拍编辑风格，每一格画面均有花卉构图"},"prompt":"创作一张 6 格编辑人像拼图，主体为一名 {argument name=\"subject\" default=\"年轻女性\"}，身着 {argument name=\"kimono pattern\" default=\"带有大面积几何灰色块的浅色传统和服\"} 和 {argument name=\"obi color\" default=\"深李色\"} 腰带，在盛开的 {argument name=\"blossom type\" default=\"樱花\"} 下拍摄。使用 {argument name=\"lighting style\" default=\"带有梦幻雾气和镜头耀斑的黄金时段逆光\"}。发型为深棕色短波波头。生成一个 2x3 的网格，包含 6 张不同的人像：1 张面朝左侧的侧面特写，1 张面朝右侧且手指轻触唇边的侧面特写，1 张四分之三全身侧面视角，1 张被前景樱花遮挡的近景人像，1 张展示腰带蝴蝶结的中景背部四分之三姿势，以及 1 张仰望太阳的背部四分之三视角人像。强调浅景深、浓郁的花卉虚化、淡粉色和奶油色调、轻盈的高调曝光、柔和的电影感漫射，呈现浪漫的日系人像摄影风格。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 樱花和服人像拼图：此提示词可生成一组六格梦幻春日人像拼图，展现了一位身着和服的女性在樱花树下的姿态，适用于编辑风格的季节性时尚大片或氛围感 AI 人像创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, backlight, shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
